tasks.subject: Step 1a: CI Wait
tasks.description: Don't start work on a branch with broken/pending CI. Surfaces upstream problems before AC effort is invested.

tasks.subject: Step 1b: Epic Complexity Assessment
tasks.description: Functional epics need stricter TDD enforcement — sets strictTDD which makes the Sub-Agent Review Gate mandatory rather than post-hoc.

tasks.subject: Step 2: Framework Methodology Dispatch
tasks.description: Loads the active framework's TDD/process guidance into context. Non-blocking.

tasks.subject: Step 2a: Load TDD Checklist
tasks.description: Externalized TDD phases (RED/GREEN/REFACTOR) enable deepReference skill loading on gate failure. Silent fallback to inline behavior is degradable but loses the deep-reference layer.

tasks.subject: Step 3: Work the Issue (Pre-Agent + Sub-Agent + Commit-per-AC gates apply)
tasks.description: Pre-Agent Status Gate is a compaction-recovery safeguard — re-verify in_progress before spawning any implementation Agent. Sub-Agent Review Gate: file content must be read and verified after every Agent return; agent summaries do not satisfy this gate. For direct-work paths (no Agent spawn), the Sub-Agent Review Gate is N/A; Step 4 file re-reads absorb the verification intent and are mandatory when strictTDD=true. Run scoped tests (touched directory tree: .claude/scripts/shared/lib → tests/scripts/shared/lib; command spec → tests/metadata or tests/commands) between AC commits for fast feedback; full-suite runs once per sub-issue at Step 4f before in_review. Commit-per-AC: do not start the next AC until this commit is made.

tasks.subject: Step 3b: Documentation Judgment
tasks.description: Construction/ artifacts (Design-Decisions, Tech-Debt) capture the why behind the work. Re-read doc-templates.json from disk — never paraphrase from memory.

tasks.subject: Step 4: Verify Acceptance Criteria
tasks.description: Ground in file state — re-read each modified file before evaluating its corresponding AC. Prevents batch fatigue hallucination where pattern-matching against memory replaces reading the file.

tasks.subject: Step 4a: QA Extraction
tasks.condition: created at Phase 2; executes only if unverifiable ACs found
tasks.description: Unverifiable ACs become QA sub-issues automatically. Re-read qa-config.json from disk.

tasks.subject: Step 4b: Force-Move Prohibition Check
tasks.description: Story/enhancement issues you implemented this session must NOT be force-moved past unchecked AC boxes. Detection: label + this-session-in-progress check.

tasks.subject: Step 4c: Log Changed Files to Issue Body
tasks.description: Issue body becomes a permanent record of what shipped. Useful for post-release audits.

tasks.subject: Step 4d: Minimize Touched Command Specs
tasks.condition: dev-repo AND any commit in this sub-issue touched CommandsSrc/
tasks.description: CommandsSrc/ edits require LLM-driven minimization to regenerate Stage 1 + Stage 2 outputs. Generative task — must invoke /fw-minimize-files via Skill tool, not a script call. Synced source + outputs is the contract the deploy pipeline depends on.

tasks.subject: Step 4e: Register Added Helpers
tasks.condition: dev-repo AND any commit in this sub-issue added a new .js under .claude/scripts/shared/[lib/]
tasks.description: Helper registration is off-band from helper creation — framework-manifest.json deploymentFiles.scripts.[shared|lib].files + constants.js INSTALLED_FILES_MANIFEST.scripts[Lib].files + @framework-script JSDoc tag all require parallel updates or CI (deployment-parity.test.js, manifest-validation.test.js) fails. Detection: git diff --name-status filtered by 'A' + path prefix .claude/scripts/shared/.

tasks.subject: Step 4f: Full-Suite Regression Sweep
tasks.description: Scoped per-AC tests can miss cross-cutting regressions; the full sweep at the sub-issue boundary catches them before in_review. Runs once per sub-issue after Step 4c/4d/4e, before Step 5. Failure blocks the in_review move; commit a fix and re-run.

tasks.subject: Step 5: Move to in_review
tasks.description: Status transition is the handoff to user review.

tasks.subject: Step 6: STOP Boundary — Cleanup, Report, Wait
tasks.description: Three-part sequence executed in order: (1) prune invocation-owned tasks from the task list (Step/AC/Sub-issue/preamble prefixes; leave user tasks intact), (2) emit the in_review report, (3) STOP and wait for 'done'. Cleanup is part of the STOP sequence, not a sibling step after it — the task list is the runtime step machine and accumulated tasks pollute compaction recovery if left across the STOP boundary. Hard stop after part (3); closing an issue is irreversible from the workflow's perspective.

tasks.subject: Step 6a: Post-Nonstop Audit
tasks.description: Three audits before the epic moves to in_review: commit density (warning, script), AC checkbox (blocking, script), test coverage (advisory, skill-delegated — invoke tdd-refactor-coverage-audit per sub-issue). Coverage audit is non-blocking and degrades gracefully when the skill is absent.
